title: Find the Width of Columns of a Grid
titleCn: 查询网格图中每一列的宽度

testcases.input: grid = [[1],[22],[333]] Output: [3] Explanation: In the 0th column, 333 is of length 3.
testcases.expectedOutput: [3] Explanation: In the 0th column, 333 is of length 3.

testcases.input: grid = [[-15,1,3],[15,7,12],[5,6,-2]] Output: [3,1,2] Explanation: In the 0th column, only -15 is of length 3. In the 1st column, all integers are of length 1. In the 2nd column, both 12 and -2 are of length 2.
testcases.expectedOutput: [3,1,2] Explanation: In the 0th column, only -15 is of length 3. In the 1st column, all integers are of length 1. In the 2nd column, both 12 and -2 are of length 2.
